e97.source: Corrected p50k_base anchor from old E97 lineage best geometry; n_heads adjusted from 285 to 271 to target 1300M.

e97-raw.source: Corrected p50k_base anchor from old E97 raw best geometry; n_heads adjusted from 369 to 354 to target 1300M.

e97-linear.source: Corrected p50k_base E97 linear-state ablation anchor from 2048x10 lineage geometry; n_heads adjusted from 277 to 260 to target 1300M.

e88.source: Corrected p50k_base E88 anchor from matched ctx2k E88 delta best geometry; n_heads adjusted from 348 to 363 to target 1300M.

e88-raw.source: Corrected p50k_base E88 raw-write anchor from old best geometry; n_heads adjusted from 362 to 381 to target 1300M.

e88-linear.source: Corrected p50k_base E88 linear-state ablation anchor using matched E88 geometry; n_heads adjusted from 348 to 363 to target 1300M.

gdn2.source: Corrected p50k_base GDN2 anchor from old eval_9 geometry; n_heads adjusted from 54 to 48 to target 1300M with patched n_heads forwarding.
Corrected p50k_base compact GDN2 anchor from tight 1152x14 geometry; n_heads adjusted from 64 to 62 to target 1300M with patched n_heads forwarding.
